chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-617 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on M.A.No.2832/2021 (U/ A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.2833/2014 (E/ A) 04. For hearing of main case. 23.11.2021 Mr.Pardeep Kumar B.Butani, Advocate for petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioner that the respondents are making appointment in their institution other than merits, without considering the petitioner for his appointment on merits. By contending so, he sought for direction against the respondents to appoint the petitioner in their institution. None, who is said to have appointed by the respondents in their institution other than merits is made a party by the petitioner in his petition. Be that as it may, the cause, if any, has accrued in favour of the petitioner in year 2016/2017/2019. Where he was for intervening period? No plausible explanation to such delay is offered by him. In view of above, the instant constitutional petition being incompetent and hit by laches is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E
